metadata.title: AI Hairstyle Changer - Transform Your Look
metadata.description: Change your hairstyle with AI. Upload your photo and try on different hairstyles instantly with our AI-powered hairstyle changer.

sidebar.tour_description: Learn how to use the hairstyle changer

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe your desired hairstyle: length, color, texture, style (e.g., short bob, long wavy blonde hair, curly afro)
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload your photo for the best results
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Description is too long, please shorten it
form.upload_hint: Click or drag to upload photos

generator.sign_in_to_generate: Sign In to Try New Hairstyles

photoGuidelines.title: Photo Guidelines for Best Results
photoGuidelines.suitableDescription: Please upload a clear, front-facing photo of your face. To create a satisfying look, it's ideal to pull your hair up or back. And let your hair hang naturally.
photoGuidelines.unsuitableDescription: Please don't upload photos taken from the side, in low light, where your face is covered by hair or any other objects. Also, please avoid cartoon images.
